revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template gives an overview of [[International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA) templates. It is aimed to be used in templates' documentation.
{{collapsible option}}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: -->
[[Category:International Phonetic Alphabet templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template gives an overview of [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA) templates. It is aimed to be used in templates' documentation.
{{collapsible option}}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: -->
[[Category:International Phonetic Alphabet templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template gives an overview of [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA) templates. It is aimed to be used in templates' documentation.
{{collapsible option}}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: -->
[[Category:International Phonetic Alphabet templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template gives an overview of [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA) templates. It is aimed to be used in templates' documentation.

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template gives an overview of [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA) templates. It is aimed to be used in templates' documentation.
{{collapsible option}}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: -->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:International Phonetic Alphabet templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
